title: Subscription
description: A subscription product defined in the Google Play Console. Contains base plans, listings, and tax and compliance settings.

packageName.description: The package name of the parent app.

productId.description: The unique product ID of the subscription.

basePlans.description: The set of base plans for this subscription. A subscription must have at least one base plan.

listings.description: The localized listings for this subscription. Must have at least one listing.
